name: exitCodeForSeverityRank
desc: Map the most severe issue rank to the appropriate exit code.

name: exitInternalFailure
desc: Internal FireDoctor failure (e.g. crash, invalid args).

name: exitNoIssues
desc: No issues found — all checks passed.

name: exitWarningsOnly
desc: Only warning issues found (no errors or critical).

name: exitCode
desc:
CI-friendly exit code:
0 = no issues
1 = warnings only
2 = errors (but no critical)
3 = critical issues

name: mostSevereRank
desc:
The highest severity rank across all results.
0 = no issues, 1 = info only, 2 = warnings, 3 = errors, 4 = critical.

name: mostSevereRank
desc:
The highest severity rank among all issues.
Returns 0 if no issues.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: parseFirebaseAppDelegateProxyValue
desc:
Returns null if the key is absent, true if set to <true/>,
false if set to <false/>.

name: getConfidenceByCategory
desc: Returns average confidence grouped by analyzer category

name: loadExpectedFindings
desc: Load expected findings from a project's expected_findings.json

name: validateAll
desc: Validate all projects in a directory

name: validateProject
desc: Run all analyzers on a single project and produce a ValidationEntry
